The '''D'larah palm''' was a [[Palm tree/Legends|palm tree]]<ref name="CSWE" /> native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Demophon]] and widely seen in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[D'larah]].<ref name="TC" /> The plant had been genetically designed to be able to grow inside the city, as it was covered by a large dome. The D'larah palm was noticeable for its bright red colored leaves. The plant was also well known for producing a deep red fruit that contained a very sweet [[Milk/Legends|milk]].<ref name="TC" />
